news.title:
Alembic Pharmaceuticals marks first US prescription sale of Pivya, an oral antibiotic for uUTI in women.
Pivya targets a large US market with 30M annual prescriptions, debuting as Alembic's first US branded product.
news.summary:
Alembic Pharmaceuticals marks first US prescription sale of Pivya, an oral antibiotic for uUTI in women.
Pivya targets a large US market with 30M annual prescriptions, debuting as Alembic's first US branded product.

news.title:
Alembic Pharma got USFDA approval for Lamotrigine ODT, used for seizures and bipolar I disorder.
Stock traded at ₹738.20, down 12% YTD despite the approval; 235 total USFDA ANDA approvals.
news.summary:
Alembic Pharma got USFDA approval for Lamotrigine ODT, used for seizures and bipolar I disorder.
Stock traded at ₹738.20, down 12% YTD despite the approval; 235 total USFDA ANDA approvals.

news.title:
Alembic Pharma secures USFDA approval for a generic seizure drug.
The approval covers multiple strengths under its ANDA submission.
news.summary:
Alembic Pharma secures USFDA approval for a generic seizure drug.
The approval covers multiple strengths under its ANDA submission.

news.title:
Alembic Pharma secures U.S. FDA approval for generic Efinaconazole solution.
The ANDA is equivalent to Jublia by Bausch Health, with a paragraph IV certification.
news.summary:
Alembic Pharma secures U.S. FDA approval for generic Efinaconazole solution.
The ANDA is equivalent to Jublia by Bausch Health, with a paragraph IV certification.

news.title:
Alembic Pharmaceuticals gets USFDA final approval for Efinaconazole Topical Solution, 10%.
The US market size for this treatment is estimated at $500 million.
news.summary:
Alembic Pharmaceuticals gets USFDA final approval for Efinaconazole Topical Solution, 10%.
The US market size for this treatment is estimated at $500 million.

news.title:
Alembic Pharma's Gujarat facility inspection by USFDA ended with two observations, unrelated to data integrity.
Q3 results: Revenue rose 10.8% YoY to ₹1,876.3 cr; net profit declined 4.1% YoY to ₹132 cr due to a ₹42 cr provision.
news.summary:
Alembic Pharma's Gujarat facility inspection by USFDA ended with two observations, unrelated to data integrity.
Q3 results: Revenue rose 10.8% YoY to ₹1,876.3 cr; net profit declined 4.1% YoY to ₹132 cr due to a ₹42 cr provision.

news.title: Alembic Pharmaceuticals completes USFDA inspection at its F-3 Injectable Facility in Karakhadi.
news.summary: Alembic Pharmaceuticals completes USFDA inspection at its F-3 Injectable Facility in Karakhadi.

news.title:
US market continued to impact Indian pharma in Q3FY26 due to pricing pressure.
Companies launched complex therapies to counter competition and product challenges.
news.summary:
US market continued to impact Indian pharma in Q3FY26 due to pricing pressure.
Companies launched complex therapies to counter competition and product challenges.

news.title:
Alembic Pharmaceuticals gets USFDA approval for Carbidopa, Levodopa, and Entacapone tablets.
The approval includes multiple strengths; Alembic now has 234 ANDA approvals.
news.summary:
Alembic Pharmaceuticals gets USFDA approval for Carbidopa, Levodopa, and Entacapone tablets.
The approval includes multiple strengths; Alembic now has 234 ANDA approvals.

news.title:
Alembic Pharma plans to boost injectables, oncology production in 18 months.
It aims to launch 4-5 U.S. products in Q4, debuting Pivya in Feb 2026.
news.summary:
Alembic Pharma plans to boost injectables, oncology production in 18 months.
It aims to launch 4-5 U.S. products in Q4, debuting Pivya in Feb 2026.

news.title:
Alembic Pharma expects FY R&D expenses at INR 600-650 Cr, with next year's R&D at 8-9% of revenue.
Indian market growth is projected to align by Q1 FY, driven by enhanced operations.
news.summary:
Alembic Pharma expects FY R&D expenses at INR 600-650 Cr, with next year's R&D at 8-9% of revenue.
Indian market growth is projected to align by Q1 FY, driven by enhanced operations.

news.title:
Alembic Pharma gets USFDA approval for Parkinson’s drug, adding to its 234 ANDA approvals.
Q2 FY26 net profit rose 20.4% YoY to Rs 184.7 cr; shares fell 2.2% to Rs 792.15 on BSE.
news.summary:
Alembic Pharma gets USFDA approval for Parkinson’s drug, adding to its 234 ANDA approvals.
Q2 FY26 net profit rose 20.4% YoY to Rs 184.7 cr; shares fell 2.2% to Rs 792.15 on BSE.

news.title:
Alembic Pharmaceuticals will miss the first wave of global generic semaglutide launches.
The company is evaluating Indian market entry via partnerships while considering later international expansion.
news.summary:
Alembic Pharmaceuticals will miss the first wave of global generic semaglutide launches.
The company is evaluating Indian market entry via partnerships while considering later international expansion.

news.title: Alembic Pharmaceuticals anticipates mid-teens US growth with a new branded launch in FY26.
news.summary: Alembic Pharmaceuticals anticipates mid-teens US growth with a new branded launch in FY26.

news.title:
Alembic Pharma Q3FY26 sees 7% QoQ USA sales growth from new products.
API sales, ANDA filings progress steadily; regional product de-growth noted.
news.summary:
Alembic Pharma Q3FY26 sees 7% QoQ USA sales growth from new products.
API sales, ANDA filings progress steadily; regional product de-growth noted.

news.title: Alembic Pharmaceuticals' Q3 net profit fell to ₹1.33B from ₹1.4B YoY.
news.summary: Alembic Pharmaceuticals' Q3 net profit fell to ₹1.33B from ₹1.4B YoY.

news.title:
Alembic Pharmaceuticals Ltd announces Mr. Ashok Pandya's superannuation as Resident Director.
Cessation effective from January 31, 2026, after business hours; no new appointment disclosed.
news.summary:
Alembic Pharmaceuticals Ltd announces Mr. Ashok Pandya's superannuation as Resident Director.
Cessation effective from January 31, 2026, after business hours; no new appointment disclosed.

news.title:
Alembic Pharma gets USFDA approval for Difluprednate Ophthalmic Emulsion 0.05.
The drug treats post-surgery inflammation and anterior uveitis; Alembic has 233 USFDA ANDA approvals.
news.summary:
Alembic Pharma gets USFDA approval for Difluprednate Ophthalmic Emulsion 0.05.
The drug treats post-surgery inflammation and anterior uveitis; Alembic has 233 USFDA ANDA approvals.

news.title:
Alembic Pharmaceuticals' board to meet on 5th Feb 2026 to review unaudited Q3 FY25 results.
Trading window for Alembic closed from 1st Jan 2026, reopening 48 hours post results declaration.
news.summary:
Alembic Pharmaceuticals' board to meet on 5th Feb 2026 to review unaudited Q3 FY25 results.
Trading window for Alembic closed from 1st Jan 2026, reopening 48 hours post results declaration.

news.title:
Alembic Pharma received USFDA tentative approval for Bosutinib 400 mg tablets for CML.
The US market size for this dosage is $251M by Sept 2025; prior approvals include 100 mg and 500 mg.
news.summary:
Alembic Pharma received USFDA tentative approval for Bosutinib 400 mg tablets for CML.
The US market size for this dosage is $251M by Sept 2025; prior approvals include 100 mg and 500 mg.
